ai_research.headline: Meta kills Llama brand, launches Muse Spark — Anthropic's secret model deemed too dangerous to release

items.title: Meta Muse Spark — Goodbye Llama
items.body: Meta's Superintelligence Labs (led by Alexandr Wang) dropped Muse Spark today — a ground-up overhaul replacing the Llama family. Described as 'small and fast by design,' it's live in Meta AI now. META stock up on the news.

items.title: Anthropic Built 'Claude Mythos' — Then Locked It Away
items.body: Anthropic developed a model internally called Mythos that was judged 'too powerful to safely release.' Cited risks: enabling hacks and weapons they couldn't anticipate. It exists, it works, and nobody outside Anthropic has touched it.

items.title: Google Gemma 4 Family — Early April
items.body: Google dropped the Gemma 4 open model family in early April. Lightweight, open-weights, designed for on-device and edge deployment. Worth watching for agent use cases where you want local inference.

ai_research.learn_today: Read the Muse Spark TechCrunch piece — Meta's 'Superintelligence Labs' rebranding signals a serious new direction worth understanding.

openclaw_agents.headline: Anthropic blocks OpenClaw from Claude Pro/Max — Microsoft Agent Framework v1.0 ships

items.title: Anthropic Cuts Off Third-Party Agent Access to Claude Pro/Max
items.body: As of April 4, Anthropic revoked OpenClaw and similar tools from using Claude Pro/Max subscriptions — 'capacity management.' You now need pay-as-you-go API billing. OpenClaw's creator (Peter Steinberger) is accusing Anthropic of copying features before the ban. He's since joined OpenAI.
items.try_this: Check your OpenClaw API billing setup — if you're still on a Pro subscription path, migrate to API keys now.

items.title: Microsoft Agent Framework v1.0 Shipped April 3
items.body: AutoGen + Semantic Kernel merged into Microsoft Agent Framework v1.0. Full MCP support, A2A protocol, 7 model providers, Python + .NET. The AutoGen you knew is now this.
items.try_this: If you've been using AutoGen, check the migration guide — v1.0 is a significant restructure.

items.title: MCP Now Supported Across 12+ Frameworks
items.body: Model Context Protocol hit 97M+ downloads. LangGraph, Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, Microsoft Agent Framework all support it natively. MCP is the standard — if you're not building your agent tools as MCP servers, you're building proprietary dead ends.
items.try_this: Pick one thing your agent does manually (web search, file access, API call) and wrap it as an MCP server this week.

items.title: LangGraph Security Alert — Patch Now
items.body: Critical vulnerabilities in LangChain/LangGraph from March 27 exposed files and secrets in production LLM apps. If you're running LangGraph in production, patch immediately.

openclaw_agents.try_today: Audit your OpenClaw API key setup — the Pro/Max subscription block means you need direct API billing to keep agents running.

tesla.note: 50K unsold Q1 vehicles piling up + JPM $145 PT still haunting. BUT: FSD v14.3 dropped today (rewritten AI compiler using MLIR), ~60 Cybercab units spotted at Giga Texas, and Tesla + SpaceX + xAI joined Intel in 'Terafab' AI chip project. Q1 earnings April 22.

tesla_spacex_xai.spacex: Terafab chip initiative confirmed — Tesla, SpaceX, xAI, Intel collaborating on next-gen AI chips. Intel stock surged on the news.
tesla_spacex_xai.xai: X rolling out Grok-powered auto-translation for all posts worldwide + new AI photo editor in iOS app (natural language edits: 'turn this into a museum painting'). No new model release — focus is on integrations.

items.title: Check JustWatch this week
items.note: Movie search timed out — check JustWatch.com for what's new on Netflix/Apple TV+ this week. Will have this section populated tomorrow.

items.title: Gumloop — AI Agent Builder for Marketing Workflows
items.body: No-code tool for building custom AI agent workflows: competitor scraping, data summarization, Slack alerts. Saves 6+ hours/week for growth teams. Worth a look for QuizzyDots acquisition automation.

items.title: Analyze AI — Track Your Visibility in ChatGPT/Perplexity
items.body: New category of SEO tool: tracks whether your product shows up when people ask AI assistants about your category. In 2026, AI search is real traffic. QuizzyDots should be showing up when people ask 'what's a good daily quiz game.'

items.title: PhantomBuster for Community Growth
items.body: Automates social scraping, follows, and outreach with CRM sync. Relevant for finding and engaging quiz/trivia communities on Reddit and Discord for QuizzyDots.

macro.mood: Markets quietly positive (SPY +0.35%) while TSLA and LMND both down ~5%. BTC holding $71K.
